message:
test(protocol): add golden artifact tests for RESP encoding

Add 23 golden tests that freeze exact RESP wire format bytes:
- SimpleString encoding (OK, PONG)
- Error encoding (generic, WRONGTYPE)
- Integer encoding (positive, negative, zero, i64 max)
- BulkString encoding (null, empty, hello, binary with null bytes)
- Array encoding (null, empty, single, mixed, nested)
- Command format (SET)
- Response formats (GET miss, SCAN, HGETALL, BLPOP)
- Sequence encoding

These catch accidental encoding changes that would break wire
compatibility with Redis clients.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
